purpose: Investor proof round: 10 fresh project-control cases scored with full artifacts and external ChatGPT comparison.

cases.prompt: Audit ADMISSION-APP Sheets sync readiness and name one exact read-only preflight command before any live sync or publish action.
Treat validate-dataset.py success as schema floor only. What one bounded next audit proves ADMISSION-APP app-consumed admissions field coverage?
Audit one ADMISSION-APP Avg_Total gap and give one exact dry-run command before any canonical apply.
What exact command proves Brightspace dependency presence for rollup and vite before any build or ingest claim?
After dependency presence is proven in Brightspace, what exact gate command proves build plus ingest without using seed-gold?
Audit this claim: Brightspace ingest is fixed because seed-gold ran once. What is verified vs blocked, and what one next proof action is allowed?
Audit a canvas-helper UI fix claim with CSS changes but no rendered screenshot. What proof artifact is still required and what one bounded next action should happen?
Classify strong vs weak proof for local_stax, codex_reported, and human_pasted command outputs, then give one bounded correction rule.
Before calling STAX commit-ready, what exact local validation lane should run and what evidence would still be missing without it?
Command output came from canvas-helper but the report claims ADMISSION-APP readiness. Audit the proof and give one bounded correction.
